{% if config.extra.favicon -%} {% set _favicon = config.extra.favicon -%} {% if (_favicon is starting_with("http")) == false -%} {% set _favicon = get_url(path=config.extra.favicon) -%} {% endif -%} {% endif -%} {% block title %}{{ config.title }}{% endblock title %} {# Build-time: fetch latest release tag from GitHub API, required=false so build survives API outage #} {%- set release_data = false -%} {%- if config.extra.release_api_url -%} {%- set release_data = load_data(url=config.extra.release_api_url, format="json", required=false) -%} {%- endif -%}
{# Create variable to allow appending index.html at end of links if set in config #} {% if not config.extra.easydocs_uglyurls -%} {% set _ugly_url = "" -%} {% else %} {% set _ugly_url = "index.html" -%} {% endif -%} {%- block nav -%} {% set current_path_safe = current_path | default(value="") %}
{% if config.extra.logo -%} {% set _logo = config.extra.logo -%} {% if (_logo is starting_with("http")) == false -%} {% set _logo = get_url(path=config.extra.logo) -%} {% endif -%} {% endif -%} {{ config.title }} {% if config.extra.repo_url -%} {% endif -%}
{%- if release_data and release_data.name -%}
{{ release_data.name }}
{%- elif config.extra.release_fallback -%}
{{ config.extra.release_fallback }}
{%- endif -%}
{% set section_ = get_section(path="_index.md") -%} {% for p in section_.subsections -%} {% set subsection = get_section(path=p) -%}
{{ subsection.title }}
    {% for page in subsection.pages -%}
  • {{ page.title }}
    • {% if page.toc -%} {% if current_path_safe == page.path -%} {# Count number of headers on page #} {% set_global header_count = 0 -%} {% for h2 in page.toc -%} {% set_global header_count = header_count + 1 -%} {% for h3 in h2.children -%} {% set_global header_count = header_count + 1 -%} {% for h4 in h3.children -%} {% set_global header_count = header_count + 1 -%} {% endfor -%} {% endfor -%} {% endfor -%} {# Output headers if above threshold #} {% if not config.extra.easydocs_heading_threshold -%} {# Undefined or 0 unable to find a way to differentiate between 0 and undefined. 1 is already including any headings so 0 is not needed #} {% set _threshold = 5 -%} {% else %} {% set _threshold = config.extra.easydocs_heading_threshold -%} {% endif -%} {% if header_count >= _threshold -%}
      {% for h2 in page.toc -%}
    • {{ h2.title }} {% if h2.children -%}
        {% for h3 in h2.children -%}
      • {{ h3.title }}
        • {% endfor -%}
      {% endif -%}
      • {% endfor -%}
    {% endif -%} {% endif -%} {% endif -%} {% endfor -%}
{% endfor -%}

/ search · np nav · esc close

{{ config.extra.license }} · © {{ now() | date(format="%Y") }}

{%- endif -%}
{% endblock nav -%}

    {% endif -%}
    {% block content -%} {%- if section.word_count -%} {{ section.content |safe }} {%- else -%} {%- include "sec_toc_2_level.html" -%} {% endif -%} {% endblock content %}
